'''âzh-zh-d-p''' ('''kazhazhdepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:newspaperize|newspaperize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-d-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:newspaperize|newspaperize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-zh-d-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazhazhdepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhazhdepoko|thizhazhdepoko]] || [[word:jizhazhdepoko|jizhazhdepoko]] || [[word:shizhazhdepoko|shizhazhdepoko]] || [[word:kizhazhdepoko|kizhazhdepoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
